pageName: AI Agent Memory and State: Unified Storage Layer | TiDB

meta.title: AI Agent Memory and State: Unified Storage Layer | TiDB
meta.description: Solve AI agent context loss with TiDB Cloud. A unified storage layer for persistent memory, durable state, and workspace context with per-agent isolation.

props.headline: AI Agent Memory and State
props.subheadline: Per-Agent Isolation and Workspace Context in One Unified Storage Platform. Stop scattering context across vector stores and caches.

props.title: Why Agents Need Memory That Lasts
props.subtitle: Without a durable memory and state layer, agents repeat work, lose preferences, and cannot reliably resume tasks.

items.title: Memory Fragments Across Disconnected Systems
items.description: Many agent stacks use one system for semantic search, another for session state, and another for files. This increases latency, complicates debugging, and turns context persistence into an application problem.

items.title: Execution Environments Reset
items.description: When temporary sessions end, agents lose conversation history and task progress unless stored durably. Persistent memory allows agents to resume work exactly where they left off.

items.title: Per-Agent Isolation Gets Expensive
items.description: Dedicated infrastructure improves isolation but is costly. TiDB provides per-agent isolation with hard data boundaries while sharing underlying infrastructure efficiently.

props.title: Memory, State, and Workspace Context
props.subtitle: TiDB Cloud, mem9, and drive9 provide a single foundation for retrieval and continuity.

items.title: Persistent Memory with mem9
items.description: Agents write conversation turns, preferences, and decisions through mem9. Memory persists across sessions and remains queryable with MVCC isolation.

items.title: Durable State with drive9
items.description: Store files, code, documents, and generated artifacts persistently. Agents pick up active tasks, generated files, and project context instantly.

items.title: Per-Agent Isolation
items.description: Logical isolation separates agents with hard data boundaries while physical infrastructure is shared. Scale isolation without multiplying costs.

items.title: Unified Query Layer
items.description: Query account tiers, prior tickets, and semantic matches in one SQL statement. No need to sync three different systems for a single context view.

items.title: Real-Time Analytics
items.description: TiFlash handles analytical queries on live memory data. Gain operational insights without moving data to a separate warehouse.

items.title: MySQL Compatibility
items.description: Integrate with existing drivers, ORMs, and tools. Move agent memory to TiDB without abandoning your SQL ecosystem.

props.title: Use Cases for AI Agent Memory
props.subtitle: From support bots to coding assistants, unified state powers reliable agents.

items.title: Customer Support Agents
items.description: Carry context across conversations. Triage and resolution agents share history without asking users to repeat themselves.

items.title: Code Generation Agents
items.description: Maintain repository structure and dependency context. Planning and implementation agents share state without conflicting write access.

items.title: Enterprise AI Platforms
items.description: Secure multi-tenant isolation. Scale context persistence and security boundaries for platforms serving thousands of customers.

props.title: Architecture: How TiDB Supports AI Agent Memory
props.subtitle: A production memory layer needs transactional writes, semantic retrieval, and analytical visibility.

items.title: The Unified Stack
items.description: Agent Frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, MCP) connect to the TiDB SQL Layer. TiKV stores transactional memory while TiFlash enables real-time analytics. Raft and MVCC ensure consistency as agents read and write simultaneously.

props.title: Production-Ready at Scale
props.subtitle: TiDB Cloud supports large-scale conversational workloads with efficient resource usage.

items.label: Availability
items.description: Reliable memory persistence for critical agent workflows

props.title: Get Started With TiDB for AI Agent Memory
props.subtitle: From prototypes to production, build agents that remember.
